name: Saucepan Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine and chocolate in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup sugar.
3. Blend in eggs, one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated before adding the next.
4. Add vanilla extract and stir to combine.
5. Stir in flour and chopped nuts until well mixed.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 8 x 8 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until set.
8. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely.
9. Cut into squares.
Makes 16 brownies.
